# Kaelin's Market

> El Cajon's first supermarket. Family owned and operated since 1958. Mexican & Arabic groceries under one roof.

Kaelin's Market (also Kaelin's Supermercado) is a family-owned independent grocery store at 1435 E Main St, El Cajon, CA 92021. Originally opened in 1958 as Kaelin's Valley Center, it was the first supermarket in El Cajon and operates the largest butcher shop in the city.

- Address: 1435 E Main St, El Cajon, CA 92021
- Phone: (619) 440-1423
- Hours: Mon-Sun 7:00 AM - 9:00 PM
- Health Score: 93/100
- Google Rating: 4.4 / 5 across 2,762+ reviews
- AppCard loyalty program
- WordPress weekly ad RSS: https://kaelinsmarket.com/category/weekly-ad/feed/

## Departments
- Tortilleria (handmade tortillas daily)
- Carniceria (Mexican cuts + halal selection)
- Panaderia (conchas, pan dulce, khubz arabi)
- Produce & Dairy
- Hot Foods (carnitas, barbacoa, shawarma, rotisserie)
- Dulceria (pinatas, Mexican candy, Arabic sweets)
- Mexican & Arabic Food (catering available)

## Differentiators
- First supermarket in El Cajon
- Mexican AND Arabic groceries under one roof
- Largest butcher shop in El Cajon
- Handmade tortillas every day
- Family-owned three generations
- Car wash on premises
